description: Parks employee to PK lookup, derived from the EOM People & Positions report
crosswalk_rule: service_no = trailing 5 digits of the 6-digit cost code; PK via svc_map; never invent a PK on a miss
occupancy_inference: dated row (TEV or Expected End) = current/acting; undated row = substantive/revert
finance_gate: every acting / TEV / temp line is AMBER pending Parks Finance
privacy: job-relevant fields only; DOB, gender, email, age, blue card, nationality deliberately excluded

21469.basis: management coding decision; differs from crosswalk PK000086 (substantive Manager)

positions.title: Manager Parks Planning Design & Capital Delivery
Manager Parks Planning Design & Capital Delivery

22791.basis: manual: Trainee code 112521 does not crosswalk; PK assigned by analyst
